label: 主体特征
placeholder: 例如：身着液态铠甲的机械武士，半透明全息影像...
placeholderEn: e.g. A mechanical warrior in liquid armor, translucent hologram...

label: 场景环境
placeholder: 例如：赛博朋克雨夜街道，霓虹灯闪烁的深巷...
placeholderEn: e.g. Cyberpunk rainy night street, neon-lit alley...

label: 光影色彩
placeholder: 例如：逆光剪影，青橙色对比，体积光穿过烟雾...
placeholderEn: e.g. Backlit silhouette, teal-orange contrast, volumetric light through smoke...

label: 艺术风格
placeholder: 例如：电影写实，8K，吉卜力美学，35mm胶片颗粒...
placeholderEn: e.g. Cinematic realism, 8K, Ghibli aesthetic, 35mm film grain...

label: 镜头景别
placeholder: 例如：极致特写，低角度仰拍，过肩镜头...
placeholderEn: e.g. Extreme close-up, low angle shot, over-the-shoulder...

label: 镜头运动
placeholder: 例如：缓慢环绕主体，手持晃动感，摇臂上升...
placeholderEn: e.g. Slow orbit around subject, handheld shake, crane up...

label: 时间节奏
placeholder: 例如：慢动作240fps，延时摄影，子弹时间...
placeholderEn: e.g. Slow motion 240fps, time-lapse, bullet time...

label: 动态事件
placeholder: 例如：花瓣随风飘落，玻璃破碎后凝滞，转身回眸...
placeholderEn: e.g. Petals falling in wind, shattered glass frozen, turning glance...

label: 技术参数
placeholder: 例如：宽银幕21:9，浅景深，锐利对焦，稳定画面...
placeholderEn: e.g. Widescreen 21:9, shallow depth of field, sharp focus, stabilized...

label: 负面排除
placeholder: 例如：模糊，畸形手指，水印，闪烁，低画质...
placeholderEn: e.g. Blur, deformed fingers, watermark, flickering, low quality...
